name: srs-navigator
description: An interactive force-directed graph visualization for **Problem-Based SRS** specifications, running as a GitHub Copilot (GHCP) canvas extension.

scripts.test: node --test tests/parser.test.mjs tests/validation.test.mjs tests/renderer.test.mjs tests/action-bar.test.mjs tests/integration.test.mjs tests/decompose.test.mjs tests/skill-sync.test.mjs
